summary: Resume Cycle 2 / R3-02 verification flow. Produce fresh evidence bundle required for L1 verification-before-completion.
blockers: No narrative-only completion claims; evidence must be command-backed and fresh for this turn.
nextActions: 1) Run `npx tsc --noEmit` from repo root. 2) Run targeted tests covering session boundary triggers: session_start
plus dedupe and fail-open behavior. 3) Return exact command outputs (including pass/fail counts and exit codes) and changed-file list. 4) If any command fails
include first failing test names and concise remediation hypothesis.
artifacts: Attach command output text and file paths touched in this cycle.
decisions: Scope remains Cycle 2 only; no expansion into Cycle 3/4.
residualRisk: Lifecycle regressions may remain hidden if targeted tests are incomplete; include explicit criterion mapping in evidence.
